scripts.build: npm run db:generate && npm run build --workspace=packages/database && npm run build --workspace=apps/backend && npm run build --workspace=apps/frontend
scripts.build:backend: cd apps/backend && npm install && npx @nestjs/cli build
scripts.build:frontend: cd apps/frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.render:backend: npm install && npx prisma migrate deploy --schema=packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma generate --schema=packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma && npm run build --workspace=packages/database && cd apps/backend && npx @nestjs/cli build
